content: TDD micro-commit cycle: write failing test commit 'red:', implement commit 'green:'. Config and techdef packages use this in Stage 1.
Squash TDD micro-commits (red:/green:) into conventional atomic commits (feat:, test:) before merge. Lead spawns a dedicated builder-squash agent for this step.
huh form groups: each prompt step maps to a *huh.Group; all groups appended to huh.NewForm() and form.Run() called once. Skip optional prompts by checking field value before appending group.
.gitignore: root the binary name with a leading slash (/doozer-scaffold) to avoid accidentally ignoring directories with the same name as the binary (e.g. cmd/doozer-scaffold/).
Stage 1 fully implemented: techdef, config, templates, scaffold, prompt (huh), CLI main.go, CI/lint config, acceptance tests. All 20 spec acceptance criteria met.
golangci-lint-action@v6: pin version explicitly (e.g. version: v2.11.2) when go.mod targets a Go version newer than the action's default lint binary.
golangci-lint-action@v7 required for golangci-lint v2.x support; v6 does not support v2.x
golangci-lint-action@v7 required for golangci-lint v2.x; v6 only supports v1.x. Always match action major version to lint major version.
golangci-lint v2 config: version: "2" must be first field in .golangci.yml; gosimple linter removed (merged into staticcheck in v2)
golangci-lint v2 config requires 'version: "2"' at top of .golangci.yml. Also gosimple linter was merged into staticcheck in v2 — do not list it separately.
husky pre-commit: use 'grep ... || true' to prevent sh -e exit on no-match; husky h runner uses 'sh -e' so grep returning 1 (no results) causes hook failure
husky v9 hooks: core.hooksPath=.husky/_ ; the '_/h' script sources the matching .husky/<hook> via 'sh -e'; pre-commit script must handle empty grep gracefully with '|| true'
Husky pre-commit hooks: .husky/pre-commit runs markdownlint-cli2 on staged .md files and golangci-lint on staged .go files. Node deps: husky, markdownlint-cli2. prepare script: husky.
husky pre-commit grep: append '|| true' to both grep commands (for .md and .go staged files) so grep's exit code 1 (no matches) does not abort the hook under husky v9's implicit set -e

description: Husky v9 runs pre-commit hooks with set -e. grep returning exit code 1 (no matches) aborts the hook.
resolution: Append '|| true' to grep commands in husky pre-commit scripts.

content: cspell.json config: use version '0.2', ignorePaths for design-docs/**, node_modules/**, package-lock.json, .git/**. Add project-specific words (doozer, golangci, markdownlint, techdef, cspell).

CI jobs for markdownlint-cli2 and cspell: use actions/setup-node@v4 with node-version '22', run npm ci, then npx command. markdownlint excludes design-docs with '#design-docs' glob negation. cspell uses --no-progress flag.

Stage 2 fully implemented: multi-tech TechDef schema (Standalone/Prompts/CI fields), Config.Technologies slice with standalone validation, 5 YAML tech defs (go/python/terraform-module/terraform-infrastructure/powershell updated), ResolveTemplate for structure paths/content, DetectPathConflicts/DetectPromptKeyConflicts, ComposeGitignore([]*TechDef), composite devcontainer (features merge+extensions dedup+sort+setup.sh ordering), RenderCIConfig (3-stage lint/test/build pipeline), universal Makefile, Generate([]*techdef.TechDef). All 54 tests pass, lint clean.

Go map index cannot be addressed: use local variable when binding huh form fields to map[string]string values (e.g. cfg.TechPromptResponses). Extract value, pass &localVal to huh field, then write back to map in Validate callback or after form.Run().

RenderCIConfig implementation: use yaml.Marshal on a map[string]interface{}. Go maps produce non-deterministic key ordering in YAML output, but for CI YAML this is acceptable since GitHub Actions jobs can appear in any order. Use ciJobEntry struct slice for internal ordering and convert to map before marshalling.

git reset --soft <base> is the right approach for squashing TDD micro-commits non-interactively. Unstage unwanted files (like overlay CLAUDE.md) with 'git reset HEAD <file>' before committing, then stage and commit in logical groups.
.claude/ directory should be gitignored — overstory builder overlay (CLAUDE.md) is auto-generated and must not be committed to main. Add .claude/ to .gitignore with a comment explaining why.

.claude/ directory must NOT be in .gitignore — it is part of the overstory mechanism and must be tracked in version control. The auto-generated builder overlay CLAUDE.md should not be committed to main (it is ephemeral per-session), but the directory itself must be unignored.

cspell pre-commit hook: filter STAGED_SPELL to only .go/.md/.tmpl files using grep -E '\.(go|md|tmpl)$'; exclude AGENTS.md with grep -v '^AGENTS\.md$'. cspell.json ignorePaths must cover runtime dirs (.seeds, .mulch, .overstory, .claude, .husky, .github), config files (*.yml, *.yaml, package.json, .gitignore, .editorconfig, Makefile, go.sum), and AGENTS.md to prevent CI failures.
